mapper.select: select issue_type_id, issue_type_name from issue_type where user_id = #{userId} order by created_at desc, issue_type_name, issue_type_id
select role_id, role_name from role where created_by = #{userId} order by role_name, role_id

select wt.from_status_id || '|' || wt.to_status_id as transition_key from workflow_transition wt join issue_type it on wt.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join role r on wt.role_id = r.role_id join issue_status fs on wt.from_status_id = fs.issue_status_id join issue_status ts on wt.to_status_id = ts.issue_status_id where wt.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and wt.role_id = #{roleId} and wt.apply_target_code = #{applyTargetCode} and it.user_id = #{userId} and r.created_by = #{userId} and fs.user_id = #{userId} and ts.user_id = #{userId} order by wt.from_status_id, wt.to_status_id
mapper.insert:
select 'WORKFLOW_TRANSITION_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(transition_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from workflow_transition where substr(transition_id, 1, 25) = 'WORKFLOW_TRANSITION_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into workflow_transition ( transition_id, issue_type_id, role_id, from_status_id, to_status_id, apply_target_code, created_by, created_at ) values ( #{transitionId}, #{issueTypeId}, #{roleId}, #{fromStatusId}, #{toStatusId}, #{applyTargetCode}, #{createdBy}, sysdate )
